parameters.query:
-- Conta o status de processamento dos centros de custo
SELECT 
  COUNT(*) as total_lines,
  SUM(CASE WHEN entries_runned = 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as number_of_entries,
  SUM(CASE WHEN outputs_runned = 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as number_of_outputs
FROM auxiliary.update_cc_report_status;
